options.text: This solution deploys the Akamai Guardicore incident-enrichment stack: a Storage Account work queue, a Data Collection Rule (and optionally a Data Collection Endpoint), two custom log tables, two Logic Apps (a Sentinel-incident-triggered playbook plus a recurrence-triggered runner), and the role assignments tying them together. After deploy, you'll authorize one managed-identity connection in the portal and wire the playbook to a Sentinel automation rule.

subLabel.preValidation: Pick the workspace that will receive enrichment data

elements.name: WorkspaceName
elements.label: Log Analytics workspace name
elements.toolTip: The name of the Microsoft Sentinel-enabled Log Analytics workspace. Must already exist.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter a valid workspace name (3-63 alphanumerics + dashes).

elements.name: WorkspaceResourceGroupName
elements.label: Workspace resource group
elements.toolTip: Resource group of the Sentinel workspace. Defaults to the deployment resource group; change only if the workspace lives elsewhere.

elements.name: DataCollectionEndpointResourceId
elements.label: Existing Data Collection Endpoint resource ID (optional)
elements.toolTip: Leave blank to provision a new DCE in this resource group. To reuse an existing DCE, paste its full resource ID (e.g. /subscriptions/.../providers/Microsoft.Insights/dataCollectionEndpoints/<name>).

elements.name: GuardicoreUrl
elements.label: Guardicore management URL
elements.toolTip: https://<your-tenant>.cloud.guardicore.com - must start with https://, no trailing slash.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be an https:// URL with no trailing slash.

elements.name: GuardicoreUser
elements.label: Guardicore username
elements.toolTip: Service account with the Read-only role; needs access to /api/v3.0/authenticate and /api/v3.0/connections.

elements.name: GuardicorePassword
elements.toolTip: Stored as a securestring ARM parameter; never persisted to the deployment history.

subLabel.preValidation: Override default names if you have a naming convention

elements.name: PlaybookName
elements.label: Trigger playbook name
elements.toolTip: Name of the incident-triggered Logic App. Default matches the legacy v1 name so existing automation rules continue to match. Override only if you have a strict naming convention.

constraints.validationMessage: Logic App names must be 2-80 alphanumerics + dashes.

elements.name: RunnerName
elements.label: Runner Logic App name
elements.toolTip: Name of the recurrence-triggered runner Logic App.

constraints.validationMessage: Logic App names must be 2-80 alphanumerics + dashes.

elements.name: StorageAccountName
elements.label: Storage account name (optional)
elements.toolTip: Globally unique 3-24 character lowercase alphanumeric storage account name. If left blank, a unique name is auto-generated.

constraints.validationMessage: Must be 3-24 lowercase alphanumeric characters, or empty for auto-generation.
